# OptiRFP

> AI-powered RFP response platform that helps proposal teams analyse RFPs, draft compliant responses, and win more contracts. Free for the first 6 projects per year.

OptiRFP combines automated RFP analysis (Gemini), proposal drafting (Claude Sonnet 4), a reusable knowledge base, compliance matrix tracking, and team collaboration into a single web app. It also publishes free, no-signup tools at /tools to help any proposal team work faster.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview, pricing, and signup.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Starter, Growth, Business, and Enterprise plans.
- [About](/about): Company background and mission.
- [Contact](/contact): Sales and support contact.
- [Security](/security): SOC 2, encryption, and data-handling practices.
- [Blog](/blog): Articles on RFP strategy, AI proposals, and government contracting.
- [FAQ](/faq): Frequently asked questions about OptiRFP.
- [Help Center](/help): Self-serve product help.
- [Documentation](/docs): How to use OptiRFP features.
- [API Docs](/api-docs): Public API reference for integrations.
- [Integrations](/integrations): HubSpot, Slack, Teams, and webhook integrations.
- [White Label](/white-label): White-label and embedded offerings for agencies.
- [Lifetime Deal](/lifetime): One-time-purchase lifetime plan.

## Free Tools

- [Free Tools Hub](/tools): Free, no-signup tools for proposal teams.
- [Proposal Word Counter](/tools/proposal-word-counter): Live word, character, and page count for proposal text.
- [RFP Deadline Calculator](/tools/rfp-deadline-calculator): Back-plan milestones from a submission date.
- [Win Rate Calculator](/tools/win-rate-calculator): Calculate win rate and revenue projections vs. industry benchmarks.
- [Compliance Matrix Generator](/tools/compliance-matrix-generator): Extract shall/must/will requirements from RFP text into an editable matrix with CSV export.
- [NAICS Code Lookup](/tools/naics-code-lookup): Search the full 2022 NAICS code list by code or keyword.
- [PSC Code Lookup](/tools/psc-code-lookup): Search the GSA Product Service Codes for federal contract classification.
- [Executive Summary Generator](/tools/executive-summary-generator): AI-powered executive summary generator for proposals.
- [Capability Statement Generator](/tools/capability-statement-generator): Build a printable federal capability statement 1-pager.
- [Bid / No-Bid Scorecard](/tools/bid-no-bid-scorecard): Weighted 12-criteria scorecard for go/no-go decisions on RFPs.
- [Proposal Outline Generator](/tools/proposal-outline-generator): AI-generated proposal outline from pasted RFP text.
- [GovCon Acronym Decoder](/tools/govcon-acronym-decoder): Search 500+ federal contracting acronyms or decode any pasted RFP inline.
- [Plain Language Readability Scorer](/tools/plain-language-scorer): Flesch-Kincaid, Gunning Fog, passive voice and jargon score for proposal text.
